description:
Dhwani by T Square Architects

In a time dominated by concrete skylines and glass façades, Dhwani stands apart as a refreshing architectural narrative one that harmoniously blends the wisdom of Kerala’s traditional design with the clarity of modern minimalism. Surrounded by lush greenery, it is more than a residence; it is a calm, introspective retreat that reconnects its inhabitants with both nature and their cultural roots.

At the heart of Dhwani lies an open-to-sky central courtyard, inspired by the essence of Kerala’s vernacular homes. Traditionally a source of light and ventilation, here it becomes the soul of the house an immersive space that invites gathering, quiet reflection, and everyday pause. By dissolving the boundaries between indoors and outdoors, the courtyard allows nature to actively shape the spatial experience within.

𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗗𝗘𝗧𝗔𝗜𝗟𝗦
Project Name: Dhwani 
Location: Malappuram,Kerala,India
Built Area:  2990 sq. ft.
Approx Cost: Undisclosed
Completion Year: 202
